## Description

Brief description of the changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs`)
- [ ] Refactoring (`refactor`)
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Scope

- [ ] `cc-app` — Student app
- [ ] `cc-admin-app` — Admin app
- [ ] `ui-kit` — Shared UI components
- [ ] `models` — Data models
- [ ] `api-client` — Networking
- [ ] `shared-utils` — Utilities
- [ ] `repo` — Global/workspace changes

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits: `type(scope): description`
- [ ] All commits follow Conventional Commits format
- [ ] Code follows project conventions (see [Conventions](wiki/docs/codebase/conventions))
- [ ] `melos run prepush` passes locally
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] Self-review completed

## Review Schedule

> ⏰ **Note:** PRs are reviewed Friday–Sunday (Europe/Kiev timezone). Initial and follow-up reviews happen during this window only.

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for details.
